headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Fox, Lowers Price Target to $67
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Steven Cahall   maintains Fox (NASDAQ:FOXA) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $75 to $67.
